title: [NoCube's] Undergarden Delight
description: Adds Farmer's Delight & The Undergarden compatibility. Vanilla style.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H340jsJv/images/20389e71c27e025b70a6ddd558512383b7784396.png)
### 📖 About

Undergarden Delight is an add-on for [Farmer's Delight]([https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)) that adds compatibility with [The Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden).
It's recommended to play with JEI and Appleskin to view recipes and food stats in-game.

Available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/undergarden-delight) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/undergarden-delight) | For Minecraft Java Edition ([Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/undergarden-delight/versions?l=forge) & [NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/mod/undergarden-delight/versions?l=neoforge)).

![Farmer's Structures compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/H340jsJv/images/06a0126e891dd075d2bb366e91f9403642f46c63.png)

Compatible with [Farmer's Structures](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-structures)

### 🥣 Main Features
- Craft new Knives from Undergarden materials. For fighting the Rotspawn and cutting cabbage!
- Taste a variety of new meals for adventures, survival and comfort. Placeable food included.
- Decorate your base with Farmer's Delight-ish wooden cabinets in style of Undergarden wood sets.
- Enjoy new well-balanced Quality of Life recipes (e.g. obtain items like Clay & Straw without leaving Undergarden).
- Use alternative and more rewarding recipes for Undergarden foods inside the Cooking Pot.
- Compatible with most other mods, lightweight and optimized - perfect for modpack enjoyers!
- And much more! - Detailed list of additions [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/undergarden-delight)

### 💬 Permissions

✔️ You are allowed to include this mod in [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/undergarden-delight) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/undergarden-delight) modpacks. Also feel free to use this mod in your videos (I would appreciate it if you leave a link to the mod page in the description).

❌ You are not allowed to reupload this mod to any other websites/launchers/apps, use any contents of this mod (textures, models, recipes, tags, etc) in other projects, sell this mod in any way or include in paid modpacks - this mod is free for all players.
